message.content:
{
  "round": 5,
  "parent_reward_id": "round3_candidate1_progress_conditioned",
  "selected_candidate_id": "round5_candidate1_progress_conditioned",
  "mutation_family": "progress_conditioned",
  "observed_outcome": {
    "coarse_result": "partial_and_success_available_but_no_decision",
    "main_failure_remaining": "early_failure (25) and low_progress_survival (5) persist but counts are low",
    "main_success_signal": "success_like trajectories appear (31), label margin sufficient (progress_gap 0.617, stability_gap 2.45), but preference construction is forbidden"
  },
  "failure_repair_outcome": {
    "failure_before": "over-penalizing components stability_near and terminal_reward discouraged near-goal progress; early_failure and low_progress_survival present",
    "repair_attempt": "progress_conditioned mutation that removed stability_near and terminal_reward, added terminal_bonus and far_quality_penalty, preserved positive components like approach_progress, leg_bonus, near_stability, proximity_bonus",
    "outcome_after": "failures reduced (25 early_failure, 5 low_progress_survival), success_like trajectories generated, but coverage policy still forbids preference construction"
  },
  "lesson": "Removing over-penalizing components while preserving progress-conditioned gating and adding achievable terminal bonuses can generate success_like trajectories, but label margin sufficiency alone does not guarantee high-confidence preference construction when coverage policy deems success_like trajectories low-confidence; future work must address ambiguous trajectory classification to allow preference learning.",
  "future_guidance": [
    "preserve progress-conditioned gating and low_progress_timeout",
    "continue to strengthen terminal_bonus achievability",
    "monitor early_failure and low_progress_survival counts to ensure they decrease further",
    "do not construct success_like preference pairs until coverage policy permits",
    "consider addressing trajectory judgment inconsistency to improve coverage quality",
    "maintain conservative mutation approach; avoid local repair as it did not succeed in previous rounds"
  ],
  "archive_update": {
    "add_to_elite_archive": false,
    "rollback_triggered": false,
    "next_parent_reward_id": "round5_candidate1_progress_conditioned",
    "reason": "Selected candidate shows progress in reducing failures and generating success_like trajectories, but label margin and coverage policy still prevent full confidence; continue evolutionary refinement from this candidate."
  },
  "uncertainties": [
    "Success_like trajectories exist in main coverage (31) but trajectory judgment subset (50 trajectories) shows 0 success_like, indicating labeling inconsistency across dataset sizes",
    "Preference construction is forbidden even though label margin is sufficient, because policy deems no high-confidence success_like trajectory",
    "Parent reward ID for round 5 mutations is uncertain; analyzer indicates round3_candidate1_progress_conditioned but could be round4_candidate1_progress_conditioned"
  ]
}
